response.overview: Ever thought you felt a bump in the night. Heard moans and groans that nobody else heard. Saw something that gave you goose bumps all over... They're here. They're hot. They're horny. Imagine what it would be like if your lover came back as a ghost. Imagine the possibilities: a ghostly lover always there always ready and waiting just for you... invisible to everyone... whispering naughty little stories in your ear... always keeping you on the verge of a climax... playing erotic ghostly games with you... Whenever you had sex they would join in... A phantom lover just for you.
response.tagline: They're Here. They're Hot. They're Horny.
response.title: Love Ghost
